idea-plugin.name: Warm Burnout
idea-plugin.description:
The theme for developers who already burned out but still have deadlines.

Fully warm palette, minimal blue light, contrast-audited to WCAG standards. Full UI theme: editor, sidebar, tabs, toolbar, popups, everything.

  • Dark: AAA contrast (7:1+) on every syntax token. For the 3am sessions.
  • Light: AA contrast (4.5:1+) on warm sepia cream. For when someone opens the blinds.

Bold keywords, italic types, readable comments. Three-tier font style system so fatigued and colorblind developers can still distinguish code structure.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2: Drop classic variants, Islands-only. Fix toolbar borders and project gradient.

1.0.1: Fix editor color scheme not loading when selecting the UI theme.

1.0.0: Initial release.
